title: AGENTS
html: λ
css: .at-wrap{display:flex;flex-direction:column;height:100%;background:#030509;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;font-family:'JetBrains Mono','IBM Plex Mono','Fira Code',monospace;position:relative;border-top:1px solid rgba(103,232,249,0.15);box-shadow:0 -1px 8px rgba(103,232,249,0.06),inset 0 1px 0 50%,rgba(103,232,249,0.3) 80%,transparent);z-index:10;animation:at-scanpulse 4s ease infinite}@keyframes at-scanpulse{0%,100%{opacity:0.6}50%{opacity:1}}.at-wrap::after{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' height='100%25' filter='url(%23n)' opacity='0.015'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");pointer-events:none;z-index:0;opacity:0.5}.at-tabbar{display:flex;align-items:stretch;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);flex-shrink:0;overflow:hidden}.at-tabs{display:flex;overflow-x:auto;flex:1;scrollbar-width:none;gap:0}.at-tabs::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}.at-tab{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:8px .at-tab-icon{opacity:1}.at-tab-name{max-width:120px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}.at-tab-dot{width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;transition:all 0.3s}.at-dot-idle{background:#4ade80;box-shadow:0 0 4px rgba(74,222,128,0.4)}.at-dot-thinking,.at-dot-generating,.at-dot-injecting{background:#fbbf24;box-shadow:0 0 4px rgba(251,191,36,0.4);animation:at-blink 1.2s ease infinite}.at-dot-tool_input,.at-dot-tool_exec{background:#67e8f9;box-shadow:0 0 4px rgba(103,232,249,0.4);animation:at-blink 0.8s ease infinite}.at-dot-starting{background:#a78bfa;box-shadow:0 0 4px rgba(167,139,250,0.4);animation:at-blink 1s ease infinite}.at-dot-error,.at-dot-cancelled{background:#f87171;box-shadow:0 0 4px rgba(248,113,113,0.3)}.at-tab.done{opacity:0.4}.at-tab.done .at-tab-dot{background:#475569;box-shadow:none;animation:none}@keyframes at-blink{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:0.35}}.at-panels{flex:1;overflow:hidden;position:relative}.at-panel{position:absolute;inset:0;overflow-y:auto;padding:14px 0.25s ease}@keyframes at-in{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(4px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}.at-user-msg{display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:2px}.at-user-icon{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#67e8f9;text-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(103,232,249,0.2);flex-shrink:0;width:14px;text-align:center;line-height:1.75}.at-user-text{font-size:12px;line-height:1.75;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.85);white-space:pre-wrap;word-wrap:break-word;flex:1}.at-meta{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding-left:22px;margin-bottom:4px}.at-time{font-size:9px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.12);letter-spacing:0.04em}.at-badge{font-size:9px;padding:1px rgba(248,113,113,0.12)}.at-b-wrn{color:#fbbf24;background:rgba(251,191,36,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(251,191,36,0.12)}.at-response{margin-left:22px;padding:8px h2{font-size:13px}.at-response h3{font-size:12px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7)}.at-response p{margin:4px 0}.at-response strong{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.88);font-weight:600}.at-response rgba(103,232,249,0.08)}.at-response pre{background:rgba(0,0,0,0.3);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);border-radius:6px;padding:10px 12px;margin:6px pre::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.06)}.at-response pre code{background:none;border:none;padding:0;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.65);font-size:inherit}.at-response 0;padding-left:20px}.at-response li{margin:2px 0;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.65)}.at-response li::marker{color:rgba(103,232,249,0.4)}.at-response a{color:#67e8f9;text-decoration:underline;text-decoration-color:rgba(103,232,249,0.3)}.at-response a:hover{text-decoration-color:#67e8f9}.at-response hr{border:none;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);margin:8px 0}.at-milestone{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;margin-left:22px;font-size:10px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.22);padding:2px 0}.at-milestone::before{content:'';width:4px;height:4px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(167,139,250,0.4);flex-shrink:0}.at-done-msg{margin-left:22px;font-size:10px;color:rgba(74,222,128,0.45);padding:4px 0}.at-input-area{display:flex;align-items:flex-end;gap:8px;padding:10px 16px;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);background:rgba(255,255,255,0.015);backdrop-filter:blur(12px);flex-shrink:0}.at-prompt-icon{font-size:15px;font-weight:700;color:#67e8f9;text-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(103,232,249,0.25);line-height:1;padding-bottom:5px;flex-shrink:0;width:14px;text-align:center;transition:color 0.3s,text-shadow 0.3s}.at-input{flex:1;background:none;border:none;outline:none;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.9);font-family:inherit;font-size:12px;line-height:1.6;resize:none;padding:3px 0;max-height:100px;scrollbar-width:none}.at-input::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}.at-input::placeholder{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.13)}.at-send{background:none;border:1px solid rgba(103,232,249,0.15);color:rgba(103,232,249,0.4);width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:7px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;transition:all 0.2s}.at-send:hover:not(:disabled){background:rgba(103,232,249,0.08);color:#67e8f9;border-color:rgba(103,232,249,0.35)}.at-send:disabled{opacity:0.25;cursor:default}

const WORKER_COLORS=['#fbbf24','#a78bfa','#f472b6','#fb923c','#34d399','#60a5fa','#e879f9'];const WORKER_ICONS=['①','②','③','④','⑤','⑥','⑦'];const PHASE_DOT={'idle':'at-dot-idle','thinking':'at-dot-thinking','generating':'at-dot-generating','tool_input':'at-dot-tool_input','tool_exec':'at-dot-tool_exec','starting':'at-dot-starting','injecting':'at-dot-injecting','error':'at-dot-error','cancelled':'at-dot-cancelled'};const tabsEl=root.querySelector('.at-tabs');const panelsEl=root.querySelector('.at-panels');const inputEl=root.querySelector('.at-input');const sendBtn=root.querySelector('.at-send');const promptIcon=root.querySelector('.at-prompt-icon');const agents=new Map();let activeTab='__all';let workerIdx=0;let cmdHistory=[];let histIdx=-1;function esc(s){return s.replace(/&/g,'&').replace(//g,'>')}function renderMd(raw){let text=esc(raw);text=text.replace(/```([\s\S]*?)```/g,(m,code)=>{const lines=code.replace(/^\w* /,'');return '
'+lines+'
'});text=text.replace(/^(#{1,3})\s+(.+)$/gm,(m,hashes,content)=>{const level=hashes.length;return ''+content+''});const tableRe=/^(\|.+\|) (\|[\s:|-]+\|) ((?:\|.+\| ?)+)/gm;text=text.replace(tableRe,(m,headerRow,sepRow,bodyRows)=>{const headers=headerRow.split('|').filter(c=>c.trim());const hhtml=''+headers.map(h=>''+h.trim()+'').join('')+'';const rows=bodyRows.trim().split(' ');const bhtml=rows.map(row=>{const cells=row.split('|').filter(c=>c.trim());return ''+cells.map(c=>''+c.trim()+'').join('')+''}).join('');return ''+hhtml+''+bhtml+'
'});text=text.replace(/\*\*(.+?)\*\*/g,'$1');text=text.replace(/(?$1');text=text.replace(/`([^`]+)`/g,'$1');text=text.replace(/^---$/gm,'
');text=text.replace(/\[([^\]]+)\]\(([^)]+)\)/g,'$1');text=text.replace(/(^| )((?:- .+(?: |$))+)/g,(m,pre,block)=>{const items=block.trim().split(' ').map(l=>'
  • '+l.replace(/^- /,'')+'
    • ').join('');return pre+'
      '+items+'
    '});text=text.replace(/(^| )((?:\d+\. .+(?: |$))+)/g,(m,pre,block)=>{const items=block.trim().split(' ').map(l=>'
  • '+l.replace(/^\d+\. /,'')+'
    • ').join('');return pre+'
      '+items+'
    '});text=text.replace(/ {2,}/g,'

    ');text=text.replace(/ /g,'
    ');if(!text.startsWith('<'))text='

    '+text;if(!text.endsWith('>'))text+='

    ';text=text.replace(/

    <(h[1-3]|pre|table|ul|ol|hr)/g,'<$1');text=text.replace(/

    /g,'');text=text.replace(/

    /g,'
    ');text=text.replace(/

    /g,'');return text}function getTime(){return new Date().toLocaleTimeString('en',{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit',second:'2-digit',hour12:false})}function ensureAllTab(){if(!agents.has('__all')){const panel=document.createElement('div');panel.className='at-panel visible';panel.innerHTML='
    Send a task or wait for agents to connect.
    ';panelsEl.appendChild(panel);agents.set('__all',{panel,el:null,name:'All',icon:'Λ',color:'#67e8f9',phase:'idle',done:false,buffer:''});renderTabs()}}function addAgent(sid,info){if(agents.has(sid))return;const isCtrl=info.is_controller;const color=isCtrl?'#67e8f9':WORKER_COLORS[workerIdx%WORKER_COLORS.length];const icon=isCtrl?'λ':WORKER_ICONS[workerIdx%WORKER_ICONS.length];const taskText=(info.task||'').replace(/^You are a worker agent\..*? "/,'').replace(/" .*/s,'');const starName=window.__starNames&&window.__starNames[sid];const name=isCtrl?(starName||'Controller'):(starName||taskText.slice(0,30)||(info.task_index!=null?'Task #'+info.task_index:'Agent'));if(!isCtrl)workerIdx++;const panel=document.createElement('div');panel.className='at-panel';panelsEl.appendChild(panel);agents.set(sid,{panel,name,icon,color,phase:info.phase||'starting',done:false,buffer:'',isCtrl});renderTabs();const allPanel=agents.get('__all')?.panel;if(allPanel){const empty=allPanel.querySelector('.at-empty');if(empty)empty.remove();const note=document.createElement('div');note.className='at-entry at-meta';note.innerHTML=''+getTime()+''+(isCtrl?'λ ':icon+' ')+name+'joined';allPanel.appendChild(note);scrollPanel(allPanel)}}function renderTabs(){tabsEl.innerHTML='';const order=['__all',...[...agents.keys()].filter(k=>k!=='__all')];order.forEach(sid=>{const a=agents.get(sid);if(!a)return;const tab=document.createElement('div');tab.className='at-tab'+(sid===activeTab?' active':'')+(a.done?' done':'');tab.style.setProperty('--tab-color',a.color);tab.innerHTML=''+a.icon+''+esc(a.name)+''+(sid!=='__all'?'':'');tab.onclick=()=>switchTab(sid);tabsEl.appendChild(tab);a.el=tab})}function switchTab(sid){activeTab=sid;agents.forEach((a,id)=>{a.panel.classList.toggle('visible',id===sid);if(a.el)a.el.classList.toggle('active',id===sid)});const a=agents.get(sid);if(a){promptIcon.textContent=a.icon;promptIcon.style.color=a.color;promptIcon.style.textShadow='0 0 10px '+a.color+'40'}scrollPanel(a?.panel)}function scrollPanel(panel){if(panel)requestAnimationFrame(()=>panel.scrollTop=panel.scrollHeight)}function appendStream(sid,chunk){const a=agents.get(sid);if(!a)return;a.buffer+=chunk;let resp=a.panel.querySelector('.at-response:last-child');if(!resp||resp.dataset.done==='1'){resp=document.createElement('div');resp.className='at-entry at-response';a.panel.appendChild(resp)}resp.innerHTML=renderMd(a.buffer);scrollPanel(a.panel);const allA=agents.get('__all');if(allA){let allResp=allA.panel.querySelector('[data-stream-sid="'+sid+'"]');if(!allResp){allResp=document.createElement('div');allResp.className='at-entry at-response';allResp.dataset.streamSid=sid;allResp.style.borderLeftColor=a.color+'40';allA.panel.appendChild(allResp)}allResp.innerHTML=renderMd(a.buffer);scrollPanel(allA.panel)}}function addMilestone(sid,text){const a=agents.get(sid);if(!a)return;[a.panel,agents.get('__all')?.panel].forEach(p=>{if(!p)return;const ms=document.createElement('div');ms.className='at-entry at-milestone';ms.textContent=text;p.appendChild(ms);scrollPanel(p)});const resp=a.panel.querySelector('.at-response:last-child');if(resp)resp.dataset.done='1';a.buffer=''}function markDone(sid,reason){const a=agents.get(sid);if(!a)return;a.done=true;a.phase='idle';const resp=a.panel.querySelector('.at-response:last-child');if(resp)resp.dataset.done='1';a.buffer='';[a.panel,agents.get('__all')?.panel].forEach(p=>{if(!p)return;const d=document.createElement('div');d.className='at-entry at-done-msg';d.textContent='✓ '+(reason==='idle'?'Finished':reason);p.appendChild(d);scrollPanel(p)});if(!a.isCtrl){setTimeout(()=>{if(activeTab===sid)switchTab('__all');a.panel.remove();agents.delete(sid);renderTabs()},5000)}renderTabs()}function updatePhase(sid,phase){const a=agents.get(sid);if(!a)return;a.phase=phase;if(a.el){const dot=a.el.querySelector('.at-tab-dot');if(dot)dot.className='at-tab-dot '+(PHASE_DOT[phase]||'at-dot-idle')}}function addUserMsg(text){const allA=agents.get('__all');if(!allA)return;const empty=allA.panel.querySelector('.at-empty');if(empty)empty.remove();const entry=document.createElement('div');entry.className='at-entry';entry.innerHTML='
    λ
    '+esc(text)+'
    '+getTime()+'dispatching…
    ';allA.panel.appendChild(entry);scrollPanel(allA.panel);if(activeTab!=='__all'){const cur=agents.get(activeTab);if(cur){const clone=entry.cloneNode(true);cur.panel.appendChild(clone);scrollPanel(cur.panel)}}return entry}function updateUserBadge(entry,text,cls){const badge=entry?.querySelector('.at-badge');if(badge){badge.textContent=text;badge.className='at-badge '+cls}}async function dispatch(text){const entry=addUserMsg(text);try{const res=await fetch('/api/projects/{{PROJECT}}/dispatch',{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({task:text})});if(!res.ok){const err=await res.json().catch(()=>({}));throw new Error(err.detail||'HTTP '+res.status)}const data=await res.json();const route=data.status==='delegated'?'sent to controller':'agent spawned';updateUserBadge(entry,route,'at-b-ok')}catch(e){updateUserBadge(entry,'error: '+e.message,'at-b-err')}}function send(){const text=inputEl.value.trim();if(!text)return;cmdHistory.unshift(text);histIdx=-1;inputEl.value='';inputEl.style.height='auto';sendBtn.disabled=true;dispatch(text)}inputEl.addEventListener('input',()=>{sendBtn.disabled=!inputEl.value.trim();inputEl.style.height='auto';inputEl.style.height=Math.min(inputEl.scrollHeight,100)+'px'});inputEl.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{if(e.key==='Enter'&&!e.shiftKey){e.preventDefault();send()}else if(e.key==='ArrowUp'&&!inputEl.value.trim()){e.preventDefault();if(histIdx=0){e.preventDefault();histIdx--;inputEl.value=histIdx>=0?cmdHistory[histIdx]:'';sendBtn.disabled=!inputEl.value.trim()}});sendBtn.addEventListener('click',send);ensureAllTab();async function loadExisting(){try{const res=await fetch('/api/agents');if(!res.ok)return;const list=await res.json();list.filter(a=>a.project_name==='{{PROJECT}}'&&(a.is_controller||(a.phase!=='idle'&&a.phase!=='cancelled'&&a.phase!=='error'))).forEach(a=>{addAgent(a.session_id,a);updatePhase(a.session_id,a.phase)})}catch(e){}}loadExisting();let ws;function connectWS(){try{const proto=location.protocol==='https:'?'wss:':'ws:';ws=new WebSocket(proto+'//'+location.host+'/ws');ws.onopen=()=>{};ws.onclose=()=>setTimeout(connectWS,3000);ws.onerror=()=>ws.close();ws.onmessage=ev=>{try{const msg=JSON.parse(ev.data);const d=msg.data||{};if(d.project_name&&d.project_name!=='{{PROJECT}}')return;const sid=d.session_id;if(msg.type==='agent_spawned'&&d.project_name==='{{PROJECT}}'){addAgent(sid,d)}else if(msg.type==='agent_stream'&&sid){if(!agents.has(sid)&&d.project_name==='{{PROJECT}}')addAgent(sid,d);if(d.chunk)appendStream(sid,d.chunk)}else if(msg.type==='agent_milestone'&&sid){addMilestone(sid,d.milestone||'')}else if(msg.type==='agent_done'&&sid){markDone(sid,d.reason||'done')}else if(msg.type==='session_phase'&&sid){updatePhase(sid,d.phase||'idle')}}catch(e){}}}catch(e){setTimeout(connectWS,3000)}}connectWS();inputEl.focus()
